summary: Tested HoneyGroove Just Added Hauls and Unofficial Section Smart Flag features. Backend 100% working - detect_unofficial() correctly identifies Merry Swiftmas (32442177) as unofficial and Pink Pony Club (31785674) as official. Frontend haul cards have AlbumLink wrappers with cursor:pointer and data-testid. UnofficialPill renders at top-right (top:8px, right:8px) on album art. ISSUE: VariantReleasePage.js missing UnofficialDisclaimer section and formatText prop.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing UnofficialDisclaimer section (data-testid='unofficial-section') that exists in VinylVariantPage.js line 204-207
AlbumArt not passed formatText prop for safety-net rendering. VinylVariantPage.js line 137 passes formatText={ov.format || ''} but VariantReleasePage.js does not

merry_swiftmas_32442177.album: Merry Swiftmas (A Taylor Swift Holiday Collection)

haul_card_album_links.description: NEW_HAUL posts in /hive have AlbumLink wrappers with cursor:pointer, role=button, data-testid
haul_card_album_links.test_result: PASS - Found 15 AlbumLink wrappers, 5 haul bundle cards, 6 now spinning cards

album_link_click_popup.description: Clicking AlbumLink opens variant popup dialog
album_link_click_popup.test_result: PASS - Dialog appeared after clicking album-link

unofficial_pill_position.description: UnofficialPill renders at top-right corner of album art

official_record_no_pill.description: Official records (Pink Pony Club) should NOT show UnofficialPill

collection_bundle_records_fields.description: collection.py line 78-84: bundle entry includes discogs_id and is_unofficial
collection_bundle_records_fields.code_snippet: new_entry = { 'record_id': record_id, 'title': record_data.title, ..., 'discogs_id': record_data.discogs_id, 'is_unofficial': record_doc.get('is_unofficial', False) }

action_items: ADD UnofficialDisclaimer section to VariantReleasePage.js (copy from VinylVariantPage.js lines 204-208): {ov.is_unofficial && (<section className='mb-10' data-testid='unofficial-section'><UnofficialDisclaimer /></section>)}
ADD formatText prop to AlbumArt in VariantReleasePage.js line 101: formatText={ov.format || ''}
critical_code_review_comments: Backend detect_unofficial() in vinyl.py lines 22-46 correctly implements Smart Flag with 5 signals: format_descriptions, keyword regex, notes, format text, and db_records
collection.py lines 78-86: new_entry correctly includes discogs_id and is_unofficial for haul bundle posts
PostCards.js lines 50-75: AlbumLink wrapper correctly handles onAlbumClick with role=button and cursor-pointer
VariantReleasePage.js MISSING: UnofficialDisclaimer section and formatText prop (exists in VinylVariantPage.js)

success_rate.frontend: 80% - AlbumLinks working, UnofficialPill position correct, but VariantReleasePage missing disclaimer section

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Smart Flag fully verified. Frontend haul cards have AlbumLink with onAlbumClick. Issue: VariantReleasePage.js (route /variant/{id}) does NOT have UnofficialDisclaimer section (data-testid='unofficial-section') that VinylVariantPage.js (route /vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant}) has. Also missing formatText prop to AlbumArt.
